heading: Omitted
label: 28a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , provided for extension of time of annual assessment work, on mining claims in the United States, including Alaska, for period commencing , until 12 o’clock noon , and also provided for commencement of assessment work or improvements required for year ending 12 o’clock noon , immediately following 12 o’clock noon . See sections 28b to 28e of this title.act June 29, 1950, ch. 40464 Stat. 275July 1, 1949Oct. 1, 1950July 1, 1951July 1, 1950
